title: IB A1
description:
This assignment is to be performed in your interactive brokers paper trading account.

 

Strategy 1: JPY-USD Carry Trade

Timeline:

Week of Oct 28-31: Implement the strategy (This assignment)

Week of Dec 2-Dec 4: Unwind the strategy (Later assignment)

 

Step 1 (Short JPY): Buy 100,000 units of USD.JPY.

In your Interactive brokers account search for USD.JPY. Select Buy, quantity = 100,000, order type = market, time-in-force = Day. No adjustments are needed for "Profit Taker" and "Stop Loss".  

Atfer the transaction is confirmed, your account should show a credit of USD 100,000 and a debit in JPY.

 

Step 2 (Long USD assets): Buy a US Treasury Note

Go back to the main screen in your Interactive Brokers account and click on Research. Select Bond Scanner. Then select US Treasuries and set Treasury Type to "Note". Click on View Results and select one of the bonds that you like with a maturity larger than January 2026.

 

Select Buy, quantity = 100 units, ORDER TYPE = Market, TIME-IN-FORCE = Day. No adjustments are needed for "OUTSIDE RTH", "ALL or NONE" "Profit Taker".  

 

Strategy 2: JPY-EUR Carry Trade

Timeline:

Week of Oct 28-31: Implement the strategy (This assignment)

Week of Dec 2-Dec 4: Unwind the strategy (Later assignment)

 

Step 1 (Short JPY): Buy 100,000 units of EUR.JPY.

In your Interactive brokers account search for EUR.JPY. Select Buy, quantity = 100,000, order type = market, time-in-force = Day. No adjustments are needed for "Profit Taker" and "Stop Loss".  

Atfer the transaction is confirmed, your account should show a credit of EUR 100,000 and a debit in JPY.

 

Step 2 (Long EUR assets): Buy a EUR Bond

Go back to the main screen in your Interactive Brokers account and click on Research. Select Bond Scanner. Then select Non-US Sovereign Bonds and set Currency to "EUR". Click on View Results and select one of the bonds that you like with a maturity larger than January 2026. Note these bonds are issued by different countries in Europe or outside.

 

Select Buy, quantity = 100 units, ORDER TYPE = Market, TIME-IN-FORCE = Day. No adjustments are needed for "OUTSIDE RTH", "ALL or NONE" "Profit Taker".  

 

Deliverable:

Please upload a screen shot with your account holdings that clearly shows your cash and securities positions.
